The SkyStar Wheel has quickly become one of the most fun attractions along San Francisco’s waterfront. Rising high above Fisherman’s Wharf, it offers incredible panoramic views of the bay, Alcatraz, the Golden Gate Bridge, and the city skyline. The enclosed gondolas make the ride comfortable in any weather, and the slow rotation gives you plenty of time to take in the scenery and snap photos.

What really makes it special is riding around sunset or after dark when the wheel lights up and the waterfront starts glowing. It adds a really cool energy to the entire area and makes the experience feel a bit magical.

A few of us from the staff at The Green Cross always recommend the waterfront to friends visiting the city, and the SkyStar Wheel has definitely become one of the highlights down there. If you want a unique perspective of San Francisco and the bay, this is absolutely worth doing. 🎡🌉

SkyStar Wheel is located at Fisherman's Wharf and its a great way to see this area from high vantage point.  However, highly recommend to get tickets in advance as the wait times are very long or sold out for the day.
